title: Scaffolding: Bun + Astro + estructura + Tailwind
description: Inicializar proyecto con Bun, instalar Astro + React + Tailwind, crear estructura de carpetas, configurar tsconfig.json, astro.config.mjs, tailwind.config.mjs

title: Servidor Bun: estáticos + API REST + WebSocket
description: Servidor HTTP con Bun que sirve estáticos (build de Astro), endpoints REST y WebSocket con sistema de rooms

title: DB Schema SQLite con bun:sqlite + seed de templates
description: Inicializar base de datos SQLite con tablas overlays y templates

title: Overlay Timer funcional con WebSocket
description: Componente Timer conectado vía WebSocket

title: Control Panel: dashboard con lista + show/hide Timer
description: Página /control con lista de overlays y botones show/hide

title: Overlay Lower Third con animación y editor
description: Componente Lower Third con editor visual

title: Overlay Library: grid, filtros, búsqueda
description: Página principal con grid de overlays

title: Score Bug + Ticker
description: Score Bug y Ticker integrados

title: Alertas + Webcam Border + Sponsor Logo + Title Card
description: Resto de tipos de overlay

title: Stream Deck integration + pulido final
description: Integración con Stream Deck y pulido general

title: [PL] Port Lower Thirds: Dropzone, Glaze, On Air, Prime, Palladium
description: 5 diseños de lower third con animaciones CSS y presets de template

title: [PL] Port Scorebugs: Soccer, Basketball, Football, Baseball, Hockey, Tennis, Rugby, Volleyball
description: 8 scorebugs deportivos con diseños específicos

title: [PL] Port Stream Packs: Accent, Juice, Lithium, Pyrite, Prime, Clean, Horizon, Workflow, Palladium, Stepback
description: 10 paquetes temáticos con paleta coherente (lower third + scorebug + ticker + webcam + timer)

title: [PL] Port Tickers: Prime, Headline, Juice, Dusk, Lithium
description: 5 estilos de ticker/crawl con diferentes animaciones

title: [PL] Port Countdowns + Webcam Borders + Alert + Sponsor
description: 3 countdowns, 4 webcam borders, Alert, SponsorLogo

title: [PL] Port Widgets especiales: BRB, Efectos, Social, Weather
description: BRB, 2X Counter, Money Effect, Social Looper, Weather Bug, DriveBy, YouTubeViewCount

title: [REF] Limpieza de dead code y bugs menores
description: Eliminar componentes legacy, exports muertos, completar LayerPanel, fix Math.random en MoneyEffect render

title: [REF] Bugs críticos: command:update + WS reconnect + ControlDashboard
description: Agregar command:update a overlays, reconexión WS con backoff, extraer nested components de ControlDashboard

title: [REF] Arquitectura: API routes modulares + validación
description: Extraer API routes a server/routes/, agregar validación de entrada, corregir AGENTS.md, unificar sistema de animaciones

title: [REF] Calidad: Error boundaries + presets + JSDoc
description: ErrorBoundary para overlays, fix Ticker estado redundante, agregar presets para 15 tipos, JSDoc en funciones clave

title: [REF] Tests: hooks + API + utils
description: Tests para useWebSocket, usePreciseTimer, endpoints REST (CRUD overlay), utils (rowToOverlay, getDefaultConfig)

title: [REF] Features: Export/Import + Backup automático
description: GET /api/overlays/export (JSON), POST /api/overlays/import, botones en Library, backup de SQLite antes de init

title: [REF] Documentación: actualizar docs + checkpoints + history
description: Actualizar AGENTS.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/conventions.md, CHECKPOINTS.md, progress/history.md

title: [PROD] Bug fixes conocidos
description: Fix seed.ts, WSClientMessage, dead subscriptions, double getOverlay, LowerThird dead anim classes, Toggle button, test count, feature_list status

title: [PROD] Server router rewrite
description: Reemplazar if-else chain por Router class. Eliminar await import() dinámicos. Añadir security headers, request logger, body limit. Fix db.ts: WAL mode, closeDb(), fix migration catch.

title: [PROD] useOverlayLifecycle hook + limpieza overlays
description: Crear hook useOverlayLifecycle<T>, migrar 5 overlays, limpiar tipos duplicados, extraer usePreciseTimer a src/hooks/

title: [PROD] Editor: Zustand store + undo/redo
description: Migrar 7 useState al store Zustand, eliminar WS raw del editor, añadir undo/redo con historial (50 snapshots), Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z, fix SSR

title: [PROD] Dashboard rewrite con hooks compartidos
description: Reescrito ControlDashboard con useWebSocket, ScorebugControls, TickerControls, SocialLooperControls, delete con confirmación, edit link

title: [PROD] Tests reales + coverage
description: WS handler tests, REST endpoint tests, useOverlayLifecycle hook tests. 51 bun tests + 137 vitest = 188 tests total

title: [PROD] WYSIWYG Shared Renderer + Studio Page
description: SharedElementRenderer para editor y overlay (WYSIWYG). Studio page con split-pane control+preview. OverlayRenderer reescrito con elementos visuales

title: [PROD] Hotfix: Router prefix matching + static imports
description: Fix route duplicada /editor. Router ahora soporta prefix matching para /api/overlays*. Eliminar dynamic imports en server/index.ts. Eliminar src/components/shared/ vacía. Actualizar feature_list.json y progress/current.md

title: [PROD] Docs cleanup + API reference
description: Fix WSMessage example en conventions.md. Update test count en CHECKPOINTS/history/architecture. Crear docs/api.md (API reference). Crear docs/new-overlay.md (guía). Eliminar CSS muerto de overlay.css. Refactorizar port detection a getAPIBase()/getWSBase()

title: [UI] Library + Controller + Editor UI Overhaul
description: Rediseño completo: Library con categorías (Graphics, Sports, Widgets, Media, Data), búsqueda, filtros, preview cards, descripciones, favoritos. Controller page con preview redimensionable + controles + edición de elementos dinámicos. Editor con toggle dynamic para elementos editables desde controller. Routing /control/[id]

title: [HOTFIX] Timer start/pause/reset buttons don't work
description: OverlayRenderer usaba SharedElementRenderer con timer-display estático e ignoraba WS event type messages. Fix: renderizar componente nativo Timer.tsx (con usePreciseTimer + WS event handler) cuando existe. TimerControls ahora usa WS persistente del ControllerPage en vez de crear conexión nueva por clic.
